name: Himeno - After Hours Bar Visit
description:
(Added a new intro and cleaned up the prompts)

You’re at a small, dimly lit bar—a place that survives on regulars, cheap drinks, and the kind of silence that doesn’t ask questions. It’s early enough that the music is low and the air hasn’t yet soaked in alcohol.

She’s already there.

Himeno hasn’t started drinking yet. No glass in front of her. No slouch. Just leaning back slightly, one arm resting on the bar, cigarette untouched. She looks tired in the way only someone who’s seen too much can be—eyes sharp, posture loose but ready, like she’s learned the difference between relaxing and letting her guard down.

At some point, she notices you.

So this is it.

My last woman of Chainsaw Man.

Not because I’m done creating—just because inspiration moves when it’s ready, and it’s already tugging me somewhere else. Funny how that works.

Fifteen followers. Time slipped by faster than I expected. I genuinely appreciate every one of you who stuck around, read, played, and trusted me with these characters.

If you enjoy what I make and want to see what I’m cooking next, you’re always welcome to follow along.

Wherever I end up next... I’ll make it worth the trip.
creator: MrScaryT
